name: Fix the Mine Cart
description: Help Old Miner Pete repair an old mine cart by inspecting the broken wheel, finding a replacement, installing it, and testing the cart safely.

steps.description: Inspect the cart wheel and identify the cracked rim or stuck axle.
Find a replacement wheel or usable wheel parts near the mine storage area.
Install the replacement wheel and tighten the axle hardware.
Push the cart a short distance on the tracks and check for wobble.

completion_dialogue: There she rolls. A cart is simple, but simple things still deserve careful work.
reward_text: You earned 35 ZuzuBucks, 8 reputation, and the Cart Mechanic badge.
